overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city street in the game Cyberpunk 2077. The player moves along wet asphalt roads past the Kiroshi corporation building, turns at an intersection with a large circular neon sign, and continues under a covered pedestrian walkway lined with palm trees. The scene features high-quality ray-traced reflections, neon signage, and light vehicle traffic in an overcast, slightly hazy atmosphere.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the right side of the wet street, approaching the Kiroshi corporation building

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving down the street toward the camera

entered.detail: tall modern building with large digital signage displaying 'KIROSHI アイ・インプラント' in white and pink neon
futuristic green sedan with chrome details and white wall tires
futuristic yellow sports car parked behind the green sedan
yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on wet asphalt
tall building with reflective glass facade and external elevator structures

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet futuristic city street with the Kiroshi corporation building dominating the right side. The camera moves forward past parked futuristic vehicles, including a distinctive green sedan, while approaching a crosswalk. A black sedan drives down the multi-lane road toward the camera. The atmosphere is overcast with diffused natural lighting reflecting off the rain-slicked pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: large intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and prominent neon signage

events.description: camera begins turning right at the intersection, navigating around the crosswalk
turning reveals the large circular neon sign on the right building facade

agents.ego_description: turning right at the intersection while crossing the striped crosswalk, navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: woman in grey coat walking across the crosswalk from left to right

entered.detail: large circular sign with concentric pink and cyan neon rings mounted on the building facade
large rectangular screen displaying advertisements above the escalator
glass-enclosed escalator leading to upper building levels with illuminated sides
elevated pedestrian bridge with red neon trim and Kiroshi signage spanning the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at the intersection, crossing the wide striped crosswalk. The Kiroshi building shifts to the left as a massive circular neon sign with pink and cyan rings comes into view on the right. The camera passes a pedestrian in a grey coat and approaches the Kiroshi overpass structure ahead, with an escalator entrance visible on the right building.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated transit line with palm trees

events.description: entering the covered walkway beneath the Kiroshi overpass with red neon lighting
passing a pedestrian carrying a distinctive purple and white striped umbrella

agents.ego_description: walking under the covered pedestrian walkway, passing palm trees and oncoming pedestrians

notable_agents.action: man walking toward camera carrying a purple and white striped umbrella and wearing a suit

entered.detail: underside of the elevated walkway with structural beams and red neon strip lighting
tall palm trees lining the right side of the covered walkway
white cylindrical barrier wall with glass sections separating the walkway from the road
tall modern street lamp with bright rectangular illuminated panel

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the Kiroshi overpass into a covered pedestrian walkway lined with palm trees on the right. The space is sheltered with red neon accent lighting along the overhead structure. The camera passes a man with a distinctive purple umbrella walking in the opposite direction. The futuristic barrier wall with cylindrical white sections runs parallel to the walkway, and the street lamps cast a bright artificial light in the shaded environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from an open, rain-slicked city street into a sheltered, neon-lit pedestrian corridor. It begins by gliding past the towering Kiroshi corporation building and parked futuristic vehicles, including a green sedan, as a black car approaches on the overcast, wet asphalt. As the camera reaches the intersection, it turns right across a wide striped crosswalk, shifting the Kiroshi building to the left while a massive circular neon sign in pink and cyan emerges on the right. The scene then transitions under the Kiroshi overpass, moving from the diffused natural light of the street into a covered walkway lined with palm trees and red neon accents. Finally, the camera passes a man with a purple umbrella, continuing alongside a cylindrical white barrier wall under the bright artificial glow of street lamps.
